ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

title: V.

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: The will and the energy of God is the effective and foreseeing cause of every time and place and age, and of every nature.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: The will is the reason (λόγος) of the intellectual soul, which [reason] is within us, inasmuch as it is the faculty belonging to it which is endowed with freedom of action.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: The will is the mind desiring [some object], and an appetite possessed of intelligence, yearning after that thing which is desired.
